Characters.descripton: Disabled jockey seeking redemption through the Steel Ball Run race.
Italian executioner and master of the Spin, racing to save a child.
Ambitious British racer with ruthless tactics and predator instincts.
President of the United States manipulating the race for national power.
Young woman caught in the conflict, carrying secrets that shape the race.
Founder of the Steel Ball Run race, determined to make history.
Cowboy racer who protects others while tracking hidden conspiracies.
Former Neapolitan soldier using steel balls and revenge as fuel.
Mysterious racer searching for a holy relic to cleanse their sins.
Native American runner aiming to win the race for his people.
Carefree competitor who relies on absurd luck to survive every stage.
Cold assassin who uses rain as a weapon to stop intruders.
Gunslinger obsessed with the concept of true man's world.
Killer hiding in the desert who traps victims in invisible worlds.
Racer who fights using illusions and twisted sound manipulation.
Explosives expert using remote detonations to hunt down targets.
Creepy pursuer who controls flesh-eating insects in battle.
Mysterious rider using deadly rotating blades hidden in his horse.
Explosive maniac who attacks racers with pure destruction.
One of the Boom Boom brothers using explosive family teamwork.
Explosive racer who believes violence is the fastest path to victory.
Guardian of a strange forest who tests greed and fate.
Group of assassins working together to eliminate racers.
Loyal soldier who becomes nearly impossible to kill.
Scientist obsessed with anatomy who creates monsters from living flesh.
Hidden operative tracking the relics through the race routes.
A ghost of the past motivating Johnny to move forward.
Gyro's father whose teachings shaped the Spin technique.
Gyro's younger brother who becomes the reason for his mission.
Member of the Zeppeli family connected to the executioner lineage.
Valentine’s soldier who fights by manipulating energy and movement.
The First Lady of America, part of the hidden political struggle.
Steven Steel’s wife, caught between loyalty and fear.
Wealthy sponsor interested in the relic’s value and the race’s chaos.
A strange figure who offers shelter while hiding dangerous intentions.
Outlaw racer who fights using rapid-fire precision shots.
Young rider trying to prove himself in the brutal American desert.
A quiet competitor who manipulates wind currents to boost speed.
Mercenary racer who uses sandstorms to hide deadly attacks.
Bounty hunter who chases racers for money rather than victory.
Strategic rider who manipulates shadows under moonlight.
Irish racer who controls vibrations through his horse’s hooves.
Former soldier using sharp metal Spin discs as ranged weapons.
Relic hunter who kills silently and steals pieces of the corpse.
Racer who bends light to create mirages and confuse enemies.
Rider who manipulates rock fragments to create defensive armor.
Preacher-like competitor who weaponizes sound waves like sermons.
Cold-hearted competitor who controls ice shards during night stages.
Horse thief who sneaks into camps and sabotages supplies.
Showwoman racer who turns applause into energy for her attacks.
Ruthless duelist who resets time in short bursts to win gunfights.
